codeReview.summary: The new Playwright coverage matches VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-002: it clicks the visible Timer shell nav, asserts the stable /timer landing and active nav state via aria-current, and compares shell entry versus direct entry under the same authenticated storage state for default calendar, running header affordances, and shared seeded workspace facts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The repository services file still advertises a cleanup_test_schemas command that only drops ephemeral opentoggl_test_* schemas even though the mission guidance says the canonical topology is the shared opentoggl_test schema. This feature did not rely on it, but the command surface still encodes the old topology and could mislead later workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/opentoggl-ci/Code/opentoggl/.factory/services.yaml:8-9 defines cleanup_test_schemas for '^opentoggl_test_[0-9]+$'; /Users/opentoggl-ci/.factory/missions/e037dfea-351f-4685-b798-ddaaec9dfb1c/AGENTS.md says to use one dedicated test schema named opentoggl_test.

summary: Pass. The feature adds focused real-runtime shell-entry convergence coverage for the tracking timer page and satisfies the milestone contract without blocking gaps. One shared-state drift remains in .factory/services.yaml around stale ephemeral test-schema cleanup guidance.
